## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests updated or added
- [ ] `pnpm -r build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes

## Package Impact

- [ ] No public package behavior changed
- [ ] Public package behavior changed and docs/examples were updated

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or unsafe sample credentials were added
